India\\\\u2019s first national counter-terrorism policy, focusing on prevention, swift responses, inter-agency synergy, and cutting off terror funding and logistics. The policy flags threats from state-sponsored terrorism, cross-border jihadist networks, drone-based smuggling, and the convergence of terror groups with organised crime. Her remarks from that conversation are once again circulating widely on social media.In the early 2000s, Uday Kiran enjoyed immense popularity in Tollywood, delivering consecutive hits that earned him the title of \xE2\x80\x98hat-trick hero\xE2\x80\x99. At the height of his career, he became engaged to Sushmitha. However, in a surprising turn of events, the wedding was cancelled after the engagement. Police investigations at the time indicated that he had been struggling with depression, financial difficulties and a lack of film offers. Sridevi, who resides in Muscat, Oman, later clarified that public assumptions about strained relations between the Mega family and her brother were incorrect. She stated that the decision to call off the wedding was entirely Uday\xE2\x80\x99s. After the engagement, Uday and Sushmitha reportedly had detailed conversations and realised their personalities were incompatible. They mutually agreed to end the engagement, without any external pressure. function getCommission()
{
	if(parseFloat(form1.ddamt.value)<100)	
	{
		alert('Minumum Amount For DD Request 100/-');
		form1.ddamt.focus();
		return false;
	}
	f1.amt.value=form1.ddamt.value;
	f1.payname.value=form1.payname.value;
	f1.paybank.value=form1.paybank.value;
	f1.submit();//location.replace("/LoanIQ/ddrequest.jsp?amt="+form1.ddamt.value+"&payname="+form1.payname.value+"&paybank="+form1.paybank.value);
}	
function isNumber(evt) 
{
	//evt = (evt) ? evt : window.event;
	var charCode = (evt.which) ? evt.which : evt.keyCode;
	if (charCode > 31 && (charCode < 48 || charCode > 57)) 
	{
		return false;
	}
	return true;
}
function validate()
{
	var payname=document.form1.payname.value;
	var paybank=document.form1.paybank.value;
	var ddamt=document.form1.ddamt.value;
	if(payname==null||payname=="")
	{
		alert("Please Enter PayeeName...!");
		document.form1.payname.focus();
		return false;
	}
	if(paybank==null||paybank=="")
	{
		alert("Please Enter PayeeBank...!");
		document.form1.paybank.focus();
		return false;
	}
	if(ddamt==null||ddamt=="")
	{
		alert("Please Enter DD Amount...!");
		document.form1.ddamt.focus();
		return false;
	}
	return true;
}

</script>

function getCommission()
{
	if(parseFloat(form1.ddamt.value)<100)	
	{
		alert('Minumum Amount For DD Request 100/-');
		form1.ddamt.focus();
		return false;
	}
	f1.amt.value=form1.ddamt.value;
	f1.payname.value=form1.payname.value;
	f1.paybank.value=form1.paybank.value;
	f1.submit();//location.replace("/LoanIQ/ddrequest.jsp?amt="+form1.ddamt.value+"&payname="+form1.payname.value+"&paybank="+form1.paybank.value);
}	
function isNumber(evt) 
{
	//evt = (evt) ? evt : window.event;
	var charCode = (evt.which) ? evt.which : evt.keyCode;
	if (charCode > 31 && (charCode < 48 || charCode > 57)) 
	{
		return false;
	}
	return true;
}
function validate()
{
	var payname=document.form1.payname.value;
	var paybank=document.form1.paybank.value;
	var ddamt=document.form1.ddamt.value;
	if(payname==null||payname=="")
	{
		alert("Please Enter PayeeName...!");
		document.form1.payname.focus();
		return false;
	}
	if(paybank==null||paybank=="")
	{
		alert("Please Enter PayeeBank...!");
		document.form1.paybank.focus();
		return false;
	}
	if(ddamt==null||ddamt=="")
	{
		alert("Please Enter DD Amount...!");
		document.form1.ddamt.focus();
		return false;
	}
	return true;
}
